title: tephrosia savannicola
intro: Tephrosia savannicola, also known as the savanna bean or savanna lupin, is a perennial legume plant native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia savannicola include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to support digestion and reduce inflammation. Tephrosia savannicola can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
